mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS diary_id , d.content , d.created_at , d.is_item_selected , de.emotion AS emotion_name FROM diary d LEFT JOIN diary_emotion de ON d.id = de.diary_id WHERE d.id = #{diaryId} AND d.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT d.id AS diary_id , d.user_id , d.created_at , d.is_item_selected FROM diary d JOIN forest f ON d.forest_id = f.id JOIN shared_forest sf ON f.id = sf.forest_id WHERE f.id = #{forestId} AND sf.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT isd.id , isd.diary_id
, i1.id AS item_id_1 , i1.name AS item_name_1 , i1.image_url AS item_image_url_1
, i2.id AS item_id_2 , i2.name AS item_name_2 , i2.image_url AS item_image_url_2
, i3.id AS item_id_3 , i3.name AS item_name_3 , i3.image_url AS item_image_url_3 FROM item_selection_draft isd JOIN diary d ON isd.diary_id = d.id JOIN item i1 ON isd.item_id_1 = i1.id JOIN item i2 ON isd.item_id_2 = i2.id JOIN item i3 ON isd.item_id_3 = i3.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND isd.diary_id = #{diaryId}
